day_fortune.summary: 危宿日宜釀酒、塗壁、配藥。高處作業不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 酒造り・壁塗り・薬の調合に吉。高所での作業に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜釀造、塗壁、合藥。登高凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 危宿 days are favorable for brewing, plastering walls, and preparing medicine. Working at heights is not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 危宿 have extraordinary sensitivity -- like an antenna with no filter, you pick up every emotion in the room. Lunar energy gives you a rich imagination and artistic talent. Where others look at a painting and think "is it nice," you're wondering what the artist was feeling. Your inner world runs far deeper than what shows on the surface; much of the time you don't say it aloud, but a full storyline has already played out in your head. This sensitivity is a gift for creating and empathizing, but it also makes you prone to anxiety. You worry about things that haven't happened yet, and the more you think, the worse it gets. Try this exercise: ask yourself "what's the actual probability of this happening?" If it's below 30%, let it go. Most of your fears will never come true.
mansions.love_en: You tend to feel insecure in relationships and need your partner to frequently reassure you: "I'm still here," "I still love you." Ten minutes of being left on read and the anxiety kicks in; a slightly colder tone and you start wondering if it's over. These reactions don't mean you're clingy -- your sensitivity is just amplifying every tiny signal. Consider establishing a reassuring agreement with your partner, something like "I might reply late when I'm busy, but I'll always reply." Your ideal match is emotionally stable and generous with expressing affection. At the same time, build your own sources of security: your hobbies, your friend circle, your achievements. Don't load all your emotional needs onto one person.
mansions.career_en: You do well in roles that require creativity and emotional depth: art, music, writing, design, UX research, brand strategy. Your work carries a warmth and emotional resonance that others simply can't replicate. But high-pressure workplaces are genuinely harmful to you -- the kind where you're getting yelled at in meetings daily and crushed by performance targets will break you down. You need a supportive atmosphere where you're not graded every single day. The biggest barrier to promotion is caring too much about what others think. One critical remark from a manager can ruin three days for you. Learn to separate feedback about the work from feedback about you as a person -- someone saying your proposal needs revision is not saying you're a bad person.
mansions.health_en: Cold hands and feet plus water retention are likely long-standing issues for you; lunar constitution types naturally have weaker circulation. Wear thick socks and gloves in winter -- foot soaks work especially well for you. Emotions hit your body harder than most people: when you're upset, you may get headaches, chest tightness, or total exhaustion. This isn't psychosomatic drama -- your body genuinely mirrors your mental state. Find a daily ritual that keeps your mood stable: brewing tea, listening to music, drawing, taking a walk -- anything works as long as you do it consistently. Swimming and yoga suit you best; the enveloping sensation of water and slow breathing rhythms are healing for both your body and mind.
mansions.seasonal_en: Lunar types feel seasonal shifts more intensely than most. Fall is your richest season for creative inspiration -- your inner world becomes more active in the cool air. Winter can bring low moods since reduced daylight affects you significantly; get outside more. Spring brings fresh hope and energy, a good time to climb out of slumps. Summer brings strong energy but also bigger emotional swings.

life_stages_en.twenties: In your twenties, you're learning how to coexist with your own emotions. You feel everything more intensely: happier highs, harder lows. This makes your life experience incredibly rich but also exhausting. The most important thing at this stage is finding a stable anchor -- an interest, a person, a habit -- something to hold onto in the ocean of emotions.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, you understand your emotional cycles. You know when low periods are coming, when anxiety will spike, and you have coping strategies. Your creative ability peaks at this stage because your understanding of the human heart has deepened, and your work resonates more powerfully. Learn not to force output during low periods; wait for the energy to return.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, your sensitivity shifts from "a weakness that gets you hurt" to "a gift for deeply understanding people." You no longer fall apart for half a day over someone's careless remark. You can tell what deserves your attention and what can be let go. This mature sensitivity makes you an excellent listener and companion, and more people begin to see your value in relationships.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 危宿 people over fifty radiate a gentle but profound strength. The emotional storms you've weathered have given you an extraordinary understanding of human nature. Younger people feel comfortable talking to you because you truly listen and truly understand. At this age, your emotions are far more stable than in your youth -- all those anxieties and insecurities that once troubled you have become part of your wisdom.

mansions.personality: 室宿之人是天生的建設者——你不只有野心，你還知道怎麼把野心變成現實。火性能量賦予你策略思維和長遠規劃的能力，你看事情不是看眼前，而是看五年後、十年後。別人在煩惱下個月的帳單時，你在想的是五年後要住在哪裡。你做事有步驟、有計畫，不是那種衝動型的人，每一步都是算過的。在朋友圈裡你通常是最早買房、最早有穩定事業的那個。這種特質的代價是你很難真正放鬆，就算在度假也會忍不住看工作訊息。你需要有意識地告訴自己：人生不是只有「達成目標」這一件事。偶爾放下計畫，做一些沒有目的的事——散步、發呆、看一場不用動腦的電影——你會發現這些「浪費時間」的事反而讓你更有能量。
mansions.love: 你在感情裡最常被抱怨的一句話是「你心裡只有工作」。這不完全公平，但也不算冤枉你。你愛一個人的方式是替對方規劃未來、提供物質上的安全感，但對方要的可能只是你放下手機，好好陪他吃一頓飯。你的感情地雷是對方不上進——你無法忍受伴侶沒有目標、混日子的樣子。理想的對象是有自己的事業或追求，能跟你在人生道路上並肩前進的人。最重要的建議：約會的時候把手機轉靜音，吃飯的時候看著對方的眼睛而不是螢幕。這些小事比你買的任何禮物都更能讓對方感受到愛。
mansions.career: 你是那種不想當老闆都不行的人——不是因為你愛發號施令，而是因為你看事情比別人遠，自然就會被推到決策的位置。適合管理階層、創業、不動產開發、投資理財、策略顧問等需要長期布局的工作。你做計畫的能力比執行細節的能力強，所以找到一個能把你的想法落地的執行團隊很關鍵。升遷的陷阱在於你太想控制一切——事必躬親不代表負責，那叫不信任團隊。學會把事情交出去、只看結果不看過程，你的事業才能從「一個人的戰場」變成「一支軍隊」。
mansions.health: 火性能量加上高壓生活型態，你的心血管系統承受的壓力比一般人大。血壓偏高、心悸、胸悶這些症狀你可能已經習慣了，但不代表可以忽視。你壓力大的時候不會說出來，而是更努力工作，用「忙」來逃避不舒服的感覺，直到身體罷工。35 歲以後每年做一次心血管健康檢查是必要的。運動方面，你需要的是能讓你暫時忘記工作的項目——登山、游泳或騎車都不錯，重點是離開辦公室、離開螢幕。睡前不要再規劃明天的行程了，讓大腦真正關機。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你已經在想五年後要住在哪裡、十年後要達到什麼成就了。你比同齡人更早開始為未來佈局——可能已經在存錢、在投資、在累積人脈。這份野心和紀律是你最大的優勢，但也別忘了享受二十幾歲應有的自由和探索。不是每件事都需要為了未來服務。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的策略性佈局開始看到成效了。你可能已經在同齡人中走得比較前面——事業有基礎、經濟有保障、生活有方向。這個階段的挑戰是不要讓成就感把你變成工作機器。你需要學會在效率之外找到意義——問自己「我做這些是為了什麼」而不只是「怎麼做更快」。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你要面對的課題是「放手」。你花了前半生建設和控制一切，現在需要學會讓事情自然發展。這不代表你不再努力，而是你不再需要事必躬親。把你建立的系統交給信任的人運作，你轉型為監督者而非執行者。這個轉變會讓你的事業走得更遠。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的室宿人是穩固的基石。你花一輩子建設的東西——事業、家庭、人脈、資產——在這個年紀都成為了穩固的根基。你的價值不在於繼續往上蓋，而在於確保基礎穩固並傳承給下一代。放慢腳步享受你建造的一切，你值得。

mansions.seasonal: 冬天的沉寂反而讓你能專注在策略規劃上，是你做年度計畫的最佳時間。春天是執行的季節，把冬天的計畫付諸行動。夏天你的行動力和企圖心最強，適合衝刺目標和開展新專案。秋天適合檢視成果和調整策略，收斂的能量讓你看事情更清楚。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，喜營造，好建立。性剛毅而有志氣，火性奮發，善創業興家。好施予，行事磊落。宜有三男。
mansions.personality_ja: 室宿は玄武の尾端に位し、火の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、創造力に富み、何もなき処より事業を興す力を持つ。意志堅固にして情熱的、大きなる理想を掲げて邁進する。人の為に尽くすことを厭わぬ器量あり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）室宿者，火性積極，感情熱烈而行動派。戀愛即行動，思慕即追求。然急火攻心則嚇退對方，宜適度含蓄。
mansions.love_ja: 室宿は火の気を帯び、恋愛にも積極果敢。想いを抱けば即座に行動に移す情熱の持ち主なるも、その勢いが強すぎると相手を戸惑わせる。適度な含蓄が関係を育む鍵。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從建設創造之業，建築營造、發明創新、體育競技。火性之行動力，使構想成真。
mansions.career_ja: 建設と創造を担う職業に適す。建築・発明・スポーツなど。火の気がもたらす圧倒的な行動力により、構想を形にする力に長ける。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）火過旺傷心肺，宜節制體力消耗。運動過度反損元氣。
mansions.health_ja: 火が旺じすぎると心肺に負担がかかる。体力の消耗を抑え、運動も過度にならぬよう節制が肝要。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上薪火相傳。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は溢れるエネルギーで次々と挑戦する時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして功を立て業を興す。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は数々の成果が花開く実りの時期。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は培った火を次世代に受け渡す使命を担う。

day_fortune.summary: 室宿日宜結婚、搬遷、祈願、佛事。葬儀不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 婚礼・引越し・祈願・仏事に吉。葬送に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜婚姻、移居、祈願、佛事。葬送凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 室宿 days are favorable for marriage, moving, prayer, and religious ceremonies. Funerals are not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 室宿 are natural builders -- you don't just have ambition, you know how to turn it into reality. Fire energy gives you strategic thinking and long-range planning ability. You see things not in terms of right now, but five or ten years out. While others stress about next month's bills, you're thinking about where you'll be living in five years. You work in steps and plans, never acting on impulse; every move is calculated. Among your friends, you're usually the first to buy property and the first to have a stable career. The trade-off is that you can't truly relax -- even on vacation you'll sneak a look at work messages. You need to consciously remind yourself: life isn't only about "hitting targets." Occasionally drop the plan and do something purposeless -- a walk, some daydreaming, a movie that doesn't require thinking -- you'll find these "wastes of time" actually recharge you.
mansions.love_en: The most common complaint you hear in relationships is "all you think about is work." Not entirely fair, but not entirely wrong either. Your way of loving someone is planning their future and providing material security, but what they might actually want is for you to put down your phone and share a meal properly. Your dealbreaker is a partner with no drive -- you can't stand watching someone coast through life without goals. Your ideal match has their own career or pursuit and can walk the path of life alongside you. The most important advice: silence your phone on dates, and look at your partner's eyes during meals instead of the screen. These small gestures convey love more powerfully than any gift you could buy.
mansions.career_en: You're the type who ends up in charge whether you planned to or not -- not because you love giving orders, but because you see further than others and naturally get pushed into decision-making roles. Management positions, entrepreneurship, real estate development, investment, strategy consulting -- anything requiring long-term positioning suits you. Your planning ability outshines your attention to execution details, so finding a team that can bring your vision to ground level is critical. The promotion trap is wanting to control everything -- micromanaging doesn't mean being responsible, it means not trusting your team. Learn to hand things off and judge by results rather than process. That's how your career grows from a one-person battlefield into a real operation.
mansions.health_en: Fire energy combined with a high-pressure lifestyle puts more strain on your cardiovascular system than average. Elevated blood pressure, heart palpitations, chest tightness -- you may have gotten used to these symptoms, but that doesn't mean you can ignore them. When stress hits, you don't talk about it; you work harder, using busyness to escape discomfort, until your body gives out. Annual cardiovascular checkups after 35 are essential. For exercise, you need activities that make you forget about work: hiking, swimming, or cycling. The point is getting away from the office and the screen. Stop planning tomorrow's schedule before bed -- let your brain actually shut down.
mansions.seasonal_en: Winter's stillness actually helps you focus on strategic planning -- it's your best time for annual goal-setting. Spring is the season for execution; put winter's plans into action. Summer is when your drive and ambition peak, ideal for pushing toward targets and launching new projects. Fall is for reviewing results and adjusting strategy; the contracting energy helps you see things more clearly.

life_stages_en.twenties: In your twenties, you're already thinking about where you'll live in five years and what you'll achieve in ten. You start building for the future earlier than your peers -- maybe already saving, investing, or networking. This ambition and discipline are your greatest strengths, but don't forget to enjoy the freedom and exploration that your twenties offer. Not everything needs to serve the future.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your strategic planning starts paying off. You've likely pulled ahead of your peers: career foundation laid, finances secured, life on track. The challenge now is not letting achievement turn you into a work machine. You need to find meaning beyond efficiency -- ask yourself "what am I doing all this for" instead of just "how can I do it faster."
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, your big lesson is letting go. You spent the first half of your life building and controlling everything; now you need to let things develop naturally. This doesn't mean you stop working hard -- it means you no longer need to do everything yourself. Hand over the systems you built to people you trust and shift from executor to overseer. This transition will carry your career further than ever.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 室宿 people over fifty are solid foundations. Everything you spent a lifetime building -- career, family, network, assets -- has become an unshakeable base. Your value now isn't in building higher but in ensuring the foundation holds and passing it on to the next generation. Slow down and enjoy what you've built. You've earned it.

mansions.personality: 壁宿之人是真正的知識型人格——你不是那種隨便 Google 一下就滿足的人，一旦對某個主題感興趣，你會把相關的書全部找來看，把各派觀點都弄清楚才罷休。水性能量賦予你深入研究的能力，讓你在感興趣的領域很快就能達到專家等級。你跟人聊天的時候，經常能說出讓人驚訝的冷知識。問題在於你有時候太鑽牛角尖了——花了三個小時研究一個細節，結果大方向反而忽略了。你也容易陷入「我還不夠了解，所以還不能行動」的陷阱，永遠在準備卻遲遲不開始。建議給自己設定截止日期：研究到某一天就開始做，邊做邊學比什麼都準備好才開始更有效率。
mansions.love: 你談戀愛的方式很特別——你不是被外表或甜言蜜語吸引，而是被對方的思考深度打動。能跟你聊到半夜三點還停不下來的人，比長得帥帥的但話題只有吃喝玩樂的人更讓你心動。你的感情地雷是對方不願意動腦——你問「你覺得這部紀錄片在講什麼」，對方回「不知道，好無聊」，你心裡就已經扣了五十分。理想的對象不需要跟你一樣博學，但要有求知慾、願意聽你分享。建議不要把每次約會都變成學術研討會——偶爾讓情感帶路而不是理性，你會發現感情裡有些東西是分析不出來的。
mansions.career: 適合知識密集型的工作，如學術研究、數據分析、教育、出版編輯、技術顧問、專利審查等。你在需要持續學習和深度鑽研的領域會特別快樂。你做出來的報告和研究，品質通常比同事高一個檔次，因為你會自動去查證、交叉比對。升遷的障礙在於你不太會「推銷自己」——你覺得作品會說話，但現實是不會包裝的人容易被忽略。建議主動分享你的研究成果，用對方聽得懂的語言而不是專業術語。另外，不要因為「還不夠完美」就不交出去，你的七十分已經是別人的一百分了。
mansions.health: 眼睛是你最需要保護的部位——長時間閱讀、盯螢幕、在光線不足的地方看東西，你的眼睛承受的壓力比一般人大很多。乾眼症、眼壓過高、視力惡化這些問題可能已經在發生了。建議嚴格遵循 20-20-20 法則：每 20 分鐘看 20 英尺外的東西 20 秒。水性體質的你也需要注意泌尿系統的健康，多喝水是最基本的。你沉浸在研究中的時候會忘記一切，包括吃飯和上廁所，這個習慣一定要改。適合你的運動是散步或騎自行車，可以邊活動邊聽有聲書或 podcast，一舉兩得。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你大概已經看了比同齡人多好幾倍的書了。你的知識庫在別人還在探索興趣的年紀就已經相當可觀，這讓你在需要深度思考的場合特別突出。但小心不要陷入「準備永動機」——永遠覺得自己還不夠、還需要再學一些才能開始。你準備的已經夠了，去做吧。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的專業知識開始轉化為實際的價值。你不再只是一個「什麼都知道的人」，而是成為某個領域公認的專家。這個階段最重要的是學會分享——你腦袋裡有太多好東西了，如果不說出來就浪費了。開始寫文章、做分享、當講師，把知識傳遞出去。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你開始用更大的格局來看待你累積的知識。不再只是追求新的資訊，而是在已有的知識之間建立連結。你可能會發現自己十年前學的東西跟最近讀的書居然有了關聯——這種跨領域的洞察力是你最珍貴的能力。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的壁宿人是行走的圖書館。你一輩子累積的知識和見解是無價的資產。在知識爆炸的時代，你能做的不只是提供資訊，而是提供脈絡和判斷——幫助年輕人在資訊海洋中找到方向。考慮把你的知識整理成文字留下來，這是你能留給後人最好的禮物。

mansions.seasonal: 冬天是你的最佳季節，寒冷安靜的環境最適合你深度閱讀和研究。秋天是整理和歸納知識的好時機。春天的新能量會帶來新的研究興趣和學習動力。夏天你可能會覺得太熱太吵而靜不下心——找一個安靜涼爽的地方繼續你的研究。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，好文學，多才藝。性聰慧而善著述，水性流暢，能通諸般技藝。好讀書，宜有二男。
mansions.personality_ja: 壁宿は北方の守護の末端に位し、水の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、文学・芸術の才に恵まれ、知的創造力に優れる。読書を好み、学識深く、言葉を以て人の心に訴える力を持つ。温和にして教養深き性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）壁宿者，水性聰慧，感情中重知性共鳴。以學識與才華吸引對方，精神層面之契合為首要。
mansions.love_ja: 壁宿は水の気を帯び、恋愛において知的な共鳴を重んじる。学識と才能で相手を惹きつけ、精神的な結びつきを最も大切にする。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從學術文化之業，著述出版、學術研究、圖書資料。水性之智慧，使博學多才。
mansions.career_ja: 学問と文化に関わる職業に適す。著述・出版・学術研究・図書館など。水の気がもたらす知的好奇心により、博学多才の人となる。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）水性多思，腦神經系宜留意。過度用腦傷神，宜調和動靜。
mansions.health_ja: 水の気は思考を活発にするが、脳神経系に負担がかかりやすい。過度の思考は精神を消耗するため、動と静の調和が養生の要。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上著書立說。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は貪欲に知識を吸収する時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして学問が実を結び、専門家として認められる。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は諸学を融合し、独自の見識を確立する。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は蓄えた知恵を著述や教育を通じて世に伝える。

day_fortune.summary: 壁宿日宜結婚、新築、開業。南方旅行不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 婚礼・新築・開業に吉。南方への旅行に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜婚姻、新造、開業。南行凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 壁宿 days are favorable for marriage, new construction, and opening a business. Traveling south is not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 壁宿 are true knowledge seekers -- you're not the type to Google something and call it done. Once a topic catches your interest, you'll track down every related book and study all the different perspectives before you're satisfied. Water energy gives you the ability to dive deep into research, letting you reach expert-level understanding remarkably fast in any area that interests you. In conversation, you regularly drop facts that surprise people. The problem is you sometimes go too far down the rabbit hole -- spending three hours on a single detail while losing sight of the big picture. You're also prone to the trap of "I don't know enough yet, so I can't act," endlessly preparing but never starting. Set yourself a deadline: research until a certain date, then start doing. Learning by doing beats waiting until everything is perfectly understood.
mansions.love_en: Your approach to romance is distinctive -- you're not drawn by looks or sweet talk but by depth of thought. Someone who keeps you talking until 3 AM is more attractive than a good-looking person whose conversation doesn't go beyond food and entertainment. Your dealbreaker is a partner who won't engage their brain. You ask "what do you think this documentary is really about" and they say "no idea, boring" -- that's an instant fifty-point deduction. Your ideal match doesn't need to be as well-read as you, but they should be curious and willing to listen when you share. One tip: don't turn every date into an academic seminar. Occasionally let emotion lead instead of logic -- you'll discover that some things in love can't be analyzed.
mansions.career_en: You excel in knowledge-intensive work: academic research, data analysis, education, publishing and editing, technical consulting, patent review. You're happiest in fields that require continuous learning and deep investigation. Your reports and research are typically a cut above your colleagues' because you automatically verify and cross-reference everything. The barrier to promotion is that you're not great at self-promotion -- you believe your work should speak for itself, but in reality, people who can't package themselves get overlooked. Start actively sharing your research findings in plain language rather than jargon. And don't hold back work because "it's not perfect yet" -- your 70% is already someone else's 100%.
mansions.health_en: Your eyes need the most protection. Long hours of reading, staring at screens, and working in poor lighting put far more strain on your eyes than average. Dry eye, elevated eye pressure, and deteriorating vision may already be happening. Strictly follow the 20-20-20 rule: every 20 minutes, look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Water-constitution types also need to watch urinary health -- drinking enough water is the bare minimum. When you're deep in research, you forget everything including eating and bathroom breaks. That habit has to change. Walking or cycling suits you well -- you can listen to audiobooks or podcasts while you move, getting two things done at once.
mansions.seasonal_en: Winter is your best season; cold, quiet environments are perfect for deep reading and research. Fall is a good time for organizing and synthesizing knowledge. Spring brings new research interests and learning motivation. Summer might feel too hot and noisy for concentration -- find a quiet, cool spot and carry on with your work.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties, you've probably read several times more books than your peers. Your knowledge base is already substantial at an age when others are still exploring their interests, which makes you stand out in settings that demand deep thinking. But watch out for the "perpetual preparation machine" -- always feeling like you need to learn just a bit more before you can begin. You've prepared enough. Go do it.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your specialized knowledge starts converting into real-world value. You're no longer just "the person who knows everything" -- you've become a recognized expert in your field. The most important thing at this stage is learning to share. You've got too many good things in your head, and keeping them there is a waste. Start writing, presenting, teaching -- get the knowledge out there.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, you begin viewing your accumulated knowledge with a wider lens. You're no longer just chasing new information but building connections between what you already know. You might discover that something you studied a decade ago suddenly connects with something you read recently -- this cross-disciplinary insight is your most valuable capability.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 壁宿 people over fifty are walking libraries. The knowledge and perspectives you've accumulated over a lifetime are priceless assets. In an age of information overload, what you offer isn't just facts but context and judgment -- helping younger people navigate the sea of information. Consider putting your knowledge into writing and leaving it for those who come after. It's the best gift you can give.

mansions.personality: 奎宿之人是天生的樂觀派，你走進一個房間就能讓氣氛變輕鬆。木性能量帶來冒險精神和探索的渴望，你對世界充滿好奇，永遠覺得遠方有更有趣的事情在等你。你是朋友圈裡最常說「走啊，去試試看」的人，從新開的餐廳到從沒去過的國家，你都想體驗一下。這種積極的態度讓你比別人更快累積多元的人生經驗。需要注意的是，你的樂觀有時候會讓你低估風險——「沒關係啦，船到橋頭自然直」這句話你可能說太多次了。建議在冒險之前至少花五分鐘想想最壞的情況和備案。你不需要變得謹慎，但多一點準備會讓你的冒險更成功。
mansions.love: 你在感情中追求的是「一起冒險」的感覺。你不喜歡每週六固定去同一家餐廳、每年去同一個地方旅行的模式。新鮮感對你來說不是奢侈品，而是必需品。你的感情地雷是被綁住——如果對方要求你每天準時回家報到、不準跟朋友出去，你會覺得快要窒息。理想的對象是跟你一樣喜歡探索的人，或者至少不會阻止你去冒險。但長期關係需要一些穩定的基底，你的課題是學會在新鮮感和安全感之間找到平衡。偶爾為了對方留在家裡看一部電影，這不叫被束縛，這叫愛。
mansions.career: 適合需要活力和開拓精神的工作，如旅遊業、國際貿易、運動產業、創業、戶外教育等。你的熱情和樂觀能感染團隊和客戶，讓人願意跟著你的節奏走。你在開疆闢土的階段最強——開發新市場、接觸新客戶、推動新專案，這些都讓你興奮。穩定但缺乏變化的工作會讓你失去動力，你會開始遲到、分心、表現下滑。如果現在的工作讓你覺得每天都在重複同樣的事，考慮申請外派或轉調到需要更多彈性的部門。你不是不努力，只是你需要在有挑戰的環境才能發揮。
mansions.health: 肝臟是你最需要照顧的器官。你的生活型態可能比較「精彩」——朋友聚會、出去玩、嘗鮮嘗新，酒精和不規律的飲食都在考驗你的肝。你可能覺得自己年輕、體力好，喝一點沒關係，但木性體質的人肝臟本來就比較敏感。建議每週至少有兩天完全不碰酒精，讓肝臟休息。運動對你來說不是問題，你本來就是閒不住的類型，但建議選擇有趣的戶外活動而不是在健身房裡重複動作。爬山、衝浪、打球這類有變化的運動更適合你。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你大概已經去了好幾個國家、嘗試了十幾種興趣、換了三四個圈子了。你的人生在這個年紀就已經比大多數人精彩，因為你什麼都想試、什麼都敢試。繼續探索，但建議在三十歲前找到一兩件你願意認真投入的事——不然到了三十你會發現自己什麼都體驗過但什麼都不精通。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你多元的經歷開始展現價值了。別人只懂一個領域，你能把三四個領域的經驗串起來，想出別人想不到的方案。這種跨界思維是你最強的武器。但你需要學會把精力聚焦——不是停止探索，而是在探索中找到主軸。有主軸的探索叫做「斜槓」，沒有主軸的探索叫做「迷路」。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你的人生經歷成為了你最大的資本。你走過的路、見過的人、嘗試過的事，讓你在面對新挑戰時總能找到參考的經驗。這個階段你不需要再去證明「我什麼都可以」了——選擇你最在乎的領域深耕，其他的經歷會自然地支撐你。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的奎宿人是最好的旅伴和故事的講述者。你一輩子的冒險和探索累積了無數精彩的經歷和故事。年輕人需要的不只是建議，還有榜樣——你的人生告訴他們：世界很大、人生很豐富、永遠都有新的東西值得去體驗。

mansions.seasonal: 春天你的能量爆發，萬物更新的氣場讓你蠢蠢欲動想出發去做新的事。夏天的活力讓你的社交更加活躍。秋天可能會有點想靜下來——那就靜下來，這是你難得的整理時間。冬天的你需要計畫下一個冒險，不然會覺得生活太無聊。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，心地善良，好行善。性仁慈而有德望，木性生發，善護持眾生。好交友，宜有三男。
mansions.personality_ja: 奎宿は西方白虎の首に位し、木の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、心根の優しさと徳望を兼ね備える。仁慈の心を以て人に接し、困れる者を助けんとする慈悲の精神あり。交友広く、人望厚き性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）奎宿者，木性溫和，感情自然而不做作。以真摯之心待人，人緣極佳。在關係中重視自由與成長。
mansions.love_ja: 奎宿は木の気を帯び、感情は自然体にして飾り気がない。真摯な心で人に接し、人望が厚い。恋愛においても自由と互いの成長を大切にする。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從調和人際之業，外交斡旋、人事管理、諮商輔導。木性之和，使人際圓融。
mansions.career_ja: 人間関係の調和を要する職業に適す。外交・人事管理・カウンセリングなど。木の気がもたらす穏やかさにより、人間関係を円滑に導く。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）木性宜疏達，鬱結則傷肝。宜常運動、親近自然以養木氣。
mansions.health_ja: 木の気は伸びやかに巡ることを好む。鬱結すれば肝を傷めるため、定期的な運動と自然親和が養生の要。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上眾望所歸。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は広い人脈を築く時期。自然体の魅力が人を引き寄せる。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして厚い信頼を得、周囲の調整役として重宝される。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は和光同塵の境地で、あらゆる人と調和する。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は眾望を集め、自然と人が集まる存在に。

day_fortune.summary: 奎宿日宜上梁、釀酒、裁衣、出差。創業不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 棟上げ・酒造り・裁断・出張に吉。新規事業に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜上梁、釀造、裁衣、出行。創業凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 奎宿 days are favorable for beam-raising, brewing, tailoring, and business trips. Starting a new business is not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 奎宿 are natural optimists -- you walk into a room and the atmosphere lightens up. Wood energy gives you a spirit of adventure and a hunger for exploration. The world fascinates you endlessly, and you always feel like something more interesting is waiting just around the corner. You're the friend who's always saying "come on, let's try it" -- from a newly opened restaurant to a country you've never visited. This positive attitude helps you accumulate diverse life experiences faster than most. What you need to watch is that your optimism sometimes leads you to underestimate risk. "It'll work itself out" is a phrase you've probably used too many times. Before any adventure, spend at least five minutes considering the worst-case scenario and a backup plan. You don't need to become cautious, but a little preparation makes your adventures more successful.
mansions.love_en: What you're looking for in a relationship is the feeling of "adventuring together." You don't want the routine of the same restaurant every Saturday or the same vacation spot every year. Novelty isn't a luxury for you -- it's a necessity. Your dealbreaker is feeling tied down. If your partner demands you come home on time every day and forbids you from going out with friends, you'll feel suffocated. Your ideal match either shares your love of exploration or at least won't stop you from pursuing it. But long-term relationships need a stable foundation, and your lesson is finding the balance between novelty and security. Occasionally staying home to watch a movie with your partner isn't being tied down -- it's love.
mansions.career_en: You fit roles that demand energy and a pioneering spirit: tourism, international trade, sports industry, entrepreneurship, outdoor education. Your enthusiasm and optimism are contagious, making teams and clients want to follow your lead. You're at your strongest in the trailblazing phase -- developing new markets, reaching new clients, driving new projects. A stable job with no variety kills your motivation; you'll start showing up late, zoning out, and underperforming. If your current role feels like repeating the same thing every day, consider requesting an overseas assignment or transferring to a more flexible department. You're not lazy -- you just need challenge to perform.
mansions.health_en: Your liver needs the most care. Your lifestyle tends to be "eventful" -- gatherings, outings, trying new things -- and alcohol plus irregular eating all test your liver. You might feel young and strong, thinking a few drinks won't matter, but wood-constitution types have naturally sensitive livers. Give yourself at least two alcohol-free days per week to let your liver rest. Exercise isn't a problem for you since you can't sit still anyway, but choose interesting outdoor activities over repetitive gym routines. Hiking, surfing, or ball sports with variety suit you better.
mansions.seasonal_en: Spring unleashes your energy; the renewal in the air makes you itch to set off on something new. Summer's vitality fuels your social life. Fall might bring a rare urge to slow down -- go with it, this is your uncommon chance to reflect. In winter, you need to plan your next adventure, or life starts feeling too dull.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties, you've probably visited several countries, tried a dozen interests, and cycled through three or four social circles. Your life is already more colorful than most because you want to try everything and dare to try everything. Keep exploring, but before thirty, find one or two things you're willing to commit to seriously -- otherwise you'll reach thirty having experienced everything but mastered nothing.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your diverse experiences start showing real value. While others only know one field, you can weave together insights from three or four, generating ideas nobody else would think of. This cross-domain thinking is your strongest weapon. But you need to learn to focus your energy -- not stopping exploration, but finding a main thread within it. Exploration with a main thread is called a "portfolio career"; exploration without one is just being lost.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, your life experience becomes your greatest asset. The paths you've walked, people you've met, things you've tried -- they give you a reference point for every new challenge. At this stage, you no longer need to prove "I can do anything." Pick the field you care about most and go deep; your other experiences will naturally support you.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 奎宿 people over fifty are the best travel companions and storytellers. A lifetime of adventure and exploration has given you countless vivid experiences and tales. Younger people need more than advice -- they need role models. Your life shows them that the world is vast, life is rich, and there's always something new worth experiencing.

mansions.personality: 婁宿之人是天生的和平使者。金性能量帶來對平衡與和諧的追求，你走到哪裡都自帶一種「大家不要吵了」的氣場。同事之間有摩擦，朋友之間有誤會，家人之間有爭執——你總是被拉去當中間人，而且你通常能把事情圓過去。你有一種讓人卸下防備的能力，對方本來氣得要命，跟你聊完之後居然就消氣了。這個天賦的代價是你太在意別人的感受了。你會為了避免衝突而壓抑自己的想法，久了之後你可能連自己真正想要什麼都搞不清楚。「你覺得呢？」這個問題你可能很難回答，因為你第一反應永遠是想對方覺得呢。練習每天做一個「只為自己」的決定，從選午餐吃什麼開始。
mansions.love: 你在感情中是那個永遠在讓步的人。對方想吃什麼就吃什麼、想看什麼電影就看什麼電影、意見不同的時候你先妥協——你覺得這是包容，但其實是在逃避衝突。問題是壓得越久爆得越大，等到你終於忍不住的那天，對方會很震驚：「你從來沒說過你不喜歡啊？」你的感情地雷是被當作理所當然——你付出了這麼多，對方卻連一句謝謝都沒有。理想的對象是會主動問你感受、在乎你想法的人，而不是只會享受你配合的人。建議用「我」開頭的句子來表達感受：「我希望」「我覺得」「我想要」——你的需求跟對方的一樣重要。
mansions.career: 適合需要溝通協調和人際敏感度的工作，如公關、外交、諮商心理師、人力資源、調解員、客戶關係管理等。你最大的職場優勢是讓人信任——同事願意跟你說真心話、客戶覺得你會站在他們那邊、主管覺得你能處理棘手的人際問題。升遷的障礙在於你太「好」了——不好意思爭取加薪、不敢推掉不合理的任務、總是替別人收尾。記住，在職場上適度的自利不是自私，是對自己專業價值的尊重。下次績效面談，先列出你的貢獻，然後開口要你應得的。
mansions.health: 腎臟和下背部是你的弱點區域。你壓力大的時候不是頭痛就是腰痛，因為你習慣把壓力往身體裡塞。長期久坐會讓下背部的問題加速惡化，如果你的工作需要長時間坐著，每小時起來走動一下是必須的。你也容易因為替別人操心而睡不好——腦子裡轉的不是自己的事，而是「小美是不是跟小華吵架了」「主管今天心情好像不好」。建議睡前做幾分鐘的深呼吸或身體掃描冥想，把別人的情緒放下來。適合你的運動是瑜珈或皮拉提斯，特別是加強核心和下背部的動作。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你可能已經被朋友們封為「和平大使」了。誰跟誰吵架了、哪個群組氣氛變差了，大家第一個想到找你處理。這種能力很珍貴，但注意不要因此忘了自己的事。在替別人解決問題的同時，也花時間想想你自己要什麼。「你覺得呢？」這個問題留給自己回答。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的協調能力在職場上被充分認可了。你可能已經被推到了需要協調多方利益的位置——專案經理、公關、或任何需要在不同立場之間找平衡的角色。這個階段的挑戰是學會做「不讓所有人滿意」的決定。有時候選擇A就是得罪B，你無法讓每個人都開心。接受這一點。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你終於能夠在「顧慮別人」和「照顧自己」之間找到平衡了。你依然溫暖、依然善於協調，但你不再把別人的需求放在自己之前了。這種成熟的和諧——既能照顧到他人也能照顧到自己——是你最好的狀態。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的婁宿人是大家庭或大團隊裡的定心丸。你的存在讓人安心，你的話語讓人信服，因為大家知道你是真的在為所有人著想。在這個年紀，你不需要再做什麼來證明你的價值——你的存在本身就讓環境更和諧。

mansions.seasonal: 秋天是你能量最平穩的時候，金性的收斂跟秋天的氣場完美契合。秋天適合處理人際關係中累積的問題。春天帶來新的關係和機會，但也可能帶來新的衝突需要你調解。夏天你可能會因為太多社交而疲憊。冬天適合安靜地照顧自己，不需要一直當別人的避風港。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，善經商，多財利。性明敏而有才幹，金性收斂，善蓄積理財。處事精確，宜有二男。
mansions.personality_ja: 婁宿は白虎の胸に位し、金の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、商才に優れ、財を成す力に恵まれる。精確なる判断力と実行力を持ち、物事を無駄なく処理する才あり。勤勉にして計画的、着実に成果を上げる性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）婁宿者，金性雅致，感情中重品味與格調。追求洗練之愛情，對伴侶有高度審美要求。
mansions.love_ja: 婁宿は金の気を帯び、恋愛においても品格と洗練を重んじる。美的感覚に優れ、伴侶にも高い審美眼を向ける。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從美學創造之業，設計藝術、時尚美容、金融理財。金性之精煉，使品味出眾。
mansions.career_ja: 美と洗練を要する職業に適す。デザイン・ファッション・美容・金融など。金の気がもたらす精錬された感性により、卓越した審美眼を発揮する。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）金性宜潤澤，乾燥則傷肺皮。宜養陰潤肺，保持肌膚滋潤。
mansions.health_ja: 金の気は潤いを好む。乾燥は肺と皮膚を傷めるため、滋陰潤肺の養生と肌の保湿を心がけるべし。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上氣韻非凡。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は鋭い美的感覚を磨く時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして品格が成熟し、洗練された大人の魅力を放つ。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は内外ともに高い格調を備える。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は比類なき気韻を纏い、存在そのものが芸術となる。

day_fortune.summary: 婁宿日百事皆吉，尤宜搬遷、結婚。南方旅行不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 引越し・婚礼など大部分の事に吉。南方への旅行に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）百事皆吉，宜移居、婚姻。南行凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 婁宿 days are favorable for all matters, especially moving and marriage. Traveling south is not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 婁宿 are natural peacemakers. Metal energy drives your pursuit of balance and harmony -- wherever you go, you carry an aura of "everyone calm down." Friction between coworkers, misunderstandings among friends, arguments within the family -- you always get pulled in as the mediator, and you usually smooth things over. You have a way of disarming people; someone who walked in furious somehow leaves calm after talking to you. The cost of this gift is that you care too much about everyone else's feelings. You suppress your own opinions to avoid conflict, and after a while, you may not even know what you actually want. "What do you think?" is a question you struggle to answer because your first instinct is always to wonder what the other person thinks. Practice making one "just for yourself" decision every day, starting with something as simple as what to have for lunch.
mansions.love_en: You're the one who's always giving in. Your partner wants to eat somewhere, you go along; they pick the movie, you agree; when opinions clash, you yield first. You think this is being accommodating, but really you're avoiding conflict. The problem is that the longer you suppress, the bigger the eventual explosion, and your partner will be blindsided: "You never said you didn't like that!" Your dealbreaker is being taken for granted -- you've given so much and they can't even say thank you. Your ideal match is someone who proactively asks how you feel and cares about your opinion, not someone who just enjoys your compliance. Try using "I" sentences to express your feelings: "I'd like," "I think," "I want" -- your needs are just as important as theirs.
mansions.career_en: You're suited for roles requiring communication skills and interpersonal sensitivity: public relations, diplomacy, counseling, human resources, mediation, client relationship management. Your biggest workplace advantage is trust -- colleagues open up to you, clients feel you're on their side, and managers trust you to handle tricky interpersonal issues. The barrier to promotion is being too "nice" -- you won't push for a raise, you can't say no to unreasonable tasks, and you always clean up after others. Remember, reasonable self-advocacy in the workplace isn't selfish -- it's respecting your own professional value. Before your next performance review, list your contributions and then ask for what you deserve.
mansions.health_en: Your kidneys and lower back are vulnerable areas. When stress hits, you get either headaches or backaches because you tend to internalize pressure physically. Prolonged sitting accelerates lower back problems; if your job requires long hours at a desk, getting up to move around every hour is a must. You also lose sleep worrying about others -- your mind isn't running through your own problems but wondering "did Mei and Hua have a fight" or "the boss seemed upset today." Before bed, try a few minutes of deep breathing or body-scan meditation to release other people's emotions. Yoga or Pilates suits you well, especially exercises that strengthen the core and lower back.
mansions.seasonal_en: Fall is when your energy is most balanced; metal's contracting quality aligns perfectly with autumn's atmosphere. Fall is a good time to address accumulated issues in your relationships. Spring brings new connections and opportunities but may also bring new conflicts needing your mediation. Summer might drain you with too much socializing. Winter is for quietly taking care of yourself -- you don't always need to be everyone else's shelter.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties, your friends have probably crowned you the "peace ambassador." Whenever someone fights or a group chat turns sour, you're the first person they call. This ability is precious, but be careful not to neglect your own life in the process. While solving others' problems, also spend time figuring out what you want. Save the question "what do you think?" for yourself.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your coordination skills are fully recognized in the workplace. You've likely been placed in a role that requires balancing multiple interests -- project manager, PR, or anything that demands navigating between opposing positions. The challenge now is making decisions that won't please everyone. Sometimes choosing A means upsetting B, and you can't make every person happy. Accept that.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, you finally find equilibrium between considering others and taking care of yourself. You're still warm, still skilled at coordination, but you've stopped putting everyone else's needs ahead of your own. This mature harmony -- attending to others while also attending to yourself -- is your best state.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 婁宿 people over fifty are the anchor of any large family or team. Your presence is reassuring and your words carry weight, because everyone knows you genuinely have everyone's interests at heart. At this age, you don't need to do anything to prove your value -- your very presence makes the environment more harmonious.

mansions.personality: 胃宿之人是務實的享樂主義者——你不是那種空談理想的人，你要的是看得見、摸得到的好東西。土性能量賦予你對品質的敏銳度，你能分辨出一杯好咖啡和普通咖啡的差別，能一眼看出一件衣服剪裁好不好。你的品味不是裝出來的，而是天生的審美直覺。朋友請你推薦餐廳你總能給出好建議，買東西你寧可多花一點錢買品質好的，也不要便宜但用不久的。這種「寧缺勿濫」的態度讓你的生活品質比同年齡的人好。需要注意的是，你有時候會太執著於物質層面——覺得一定要存夠錢才能安心、一定要住好的地方才能開心。提醒自己，安全感不只來自銀行帳戶，也來自人與人之間的連結。
mansions.love: 你挑對象的標準很實際——不是要求對方多有錢，但至少要有穩定的生活能力和對品質的基本要求。你受不了邋遢的人，也受不了對生活完全沒有規劃的人。你的感情地雷是對方太浪費或太摳——你花錢花在刀口上，對方亂花或者什麼都不捨得花，你都會不舒服。在關係中你會用行動表達愛——做一頓好吃的飯、布置溫馨的家、挑一份實用的禮物。理想的對象是跟你有相似生活觀的人，不需要多浪漫，但要懂得一起經營好日子。建議偶爾放下對物質的堅持，有時候在路邊攤吃一碗滷肉飯也是一種幸福。
mansions.career: 適合與物質、品質或感官體驗相關的工作，如餐飲經營、精品零售、金融理財顧問、美學產業、室內設計、食品科學等。你在這些領域有天生的優勢，因為你就是自己最嚴格的品管員。你做出來的東西一定有一定水準，因為你自己過不了的關就不會讓它出去。升遷的關鍵在於不要只顧品質而忽略速度——你有時候會花太多時間在「讓它更好一點」上面，但市場等不了你。學會判斷什麼時候「夠好就好」、什麼時候要堅持到完美，這是你的管理課題。
mansions.health: 胃部是你最敏感的器官，而且跟你的情緒直接掛鉤。焦慮的時候胃會抽痛，壓力大的時候吃不下，開心的時候又容易吃太多。你跟食物的關係比一般人複雜——你可能用吃來安撫情緒，或者壓力大的時候反而完全不吃。建議維持固定的用餐時間，即使不餓也要吃一點，即使想吃也不要吃到撐。少吃刺激性的食物，你的胃比你以為的更脆弱。適合你的運動是飯後散步和瑜珈，不需要太激烈，重點是讓身體和腸胃保持活動。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你已經比同齡人更懂得「好東西」了。當別人在喝即溶咖啡的時候你已經在研究手沖了。這種對品質的追求是好事，但在二十幾歲預算有限的時候，學會分辨「值得投資」和「只是想要」的差別很重要。把錢花在能讓你成長的事情上——課程、好書、旅行——而不只是物質享受。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的品味和務實找到了平衡。你已經有能力負擔一定品質的生活了，而且你做的每一個消費決策都是經過考量的。在職場上你的「品質直覺」開始被認可——你能判斷什麼是好的、什麼是差的，這在品管、選品、策展等領域特別有價值。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你的生活可能已經相當有品質了。你住得舒適、吃得好、周圍的物品都是精心挑選的。這個階段的挑戰是不要讓物質成為你安全感的唯一來源。試著在非物質的領域也建立價值感——關係的品質、經歷的豐富度、對他人的貢獻。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的胃宿人是鑑賞家。你一輩子培養出來的品味和判斷力，讓你在生活的各個面向都能辨識出好壞。年輕人來找你不只是問意見，更是學習你那套「看事情的眼光」。這種審美和判斷力是教不來的，只能靠時間累積——而你已經累積了幾十年了。

mansions.seasonal: 秋天是你感官最敏銳的季節——秋天的食物、秋天的景色、秋天的空氣，都讓你的土性能量達到最佳狀態。春天帶來新的感官體驗。夏天你的食慾可能受影響，注意不要因為太熱就隨便吃。冬天適合品嘗溫暖的食物和飲品，用味覺來溫暖身心。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，好飲食，多享受。性豪邁而有氣度，土性厚重，善招待賓客。好營建，宜有三男。
mansions.personality_ja: 胃宿は白虎の腹に位し、土の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、豪放磊落にして気前よし。人をもてなすことを好み、食に関する感覚に優れる。度量大きく、細事に拘らぬ大らかなる性質にして、人を集める力あり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）胃宿者，土性剛毅，感情中重義氣與責任。一諾千金，對伴侶忠誠不貳。然固執之時，宜學變通。
mansions.love_ja: 胃宿は土の気を帯び、恋愛において義理と責任を重んじる。一度交わした約束は必ず守る誠実さの持ち主なるも、頑固さが過ぎる時は柔軟さを学ぶべし。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從實務管理之業，倉儲物流、飲食經營、財務會計。土性之實在，使事務井然。
mansions.career_ja: 実務と管理を担う職業に適す。物流・飲食経営・財務会計など。土の気がもたらす堅実さにより、事務を秩序正しく運営する。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）土主中焦，脾胃消化宜留意。飲食宜溫，生冷過食則傷脾。
mansions.health_ja: 土は中焦（脾胃）に通じ、消化機能の健全が肝要。食事は温かいものを基本とし、生冷の過食は脾を傷める。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上德厚流光。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は義理人情を重んじ、信頼の基盤を築く時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして持ち場を堅守し、周囲の信頼を不動のものとする。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は磐石の如き安定感で組織の要となる。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は厚い徳が自然と光を放ち、人々を導く。

day_fortune.summary: 胃宿日宜就職、結婚、建築。裁縫大凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 就職・婚礼・建築に吉。裁縫・裁断は大凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜就職、婚姻、造作。裁衣大凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 胃宿 days are favorable for starting a job, marriage, and construction. Sewing and tailoring are strongly inauspicious. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 胃宿 are practical hedonists -- you're not someone who talks about ideals in the abstract; you want things you can see and touch. Earth energy gives you a sharp eye for quality. You can tell the difference between a good cup of coffee and an ordinary one, and you spot whether a piece of clothing is well-tailored at a glance. Your taste isn't performative -- it comes from genuine aesthetic instinct. Friends always trust your restaurant recommendations, and you'd rather spend a bit more for lasting quality than save money on something that won't hold up. This "quality over quantity" attitude gives you a higher standard of living than most people your age. What to watch for: you can get too fixated on the material side, feeling you must save enough money before you can relax or live in the right place before you can be happy. Remind yourself that security doesn't come only from bank balances -- it also comes from human connection.
mansions.love_en: Your criteria for a partner are grounded in reality. You don't require wealth, but they need stable life skills and at least a basic standard for quality. You can't stand someone who's sloppy, and you can't stand someone who has zero life planning. Your dealbreaker is a partner who's either wasteful or excessively cheap -- you spend money where it counts, and someone who either throws money around or refuses to spend anything rubs you the wrong way. In a relationship, you show love through action: cooking a great meal, making the home cozy, choosing a practical gift. Your ideal match shares a similar outlook on life -- not necessarily romantic, but someone who appreciates building good days together. And occasionally, let go of your standards: sometimes a bowl of braised pork rice from a street stall is its own kind of happiness.
mansions.career_en: You're well-suited for work involving material goods, quality, or sensory experience: food and beverage, luxury retail, financial advisory, aesthetics industries, interior design, food science. You have a natural edge in these fields because you're your own strictest quality inspector. Nothing leaves your hands unless it meets your standard. The key to advancement is not sacrificing speed for quality -- you sometimes spend too much time on "making it a little better," but the market won't wait. Learning when "good enough" is truly enough and when to insist on perfection is your management lesson.
mansions.health_en: Your stomach is your most sensitive organ, directly tied to your emotions. Anxiety triggers stomach cramps, stress kills your appetite, and happiness makes you overeat. Your relationship with food is more complicated than most -- you might eat to soothe emotions, or lose your appetite entirely under pressure. Maintain regular meal times: eat a little even when you're not hungry, and stop before you're stuffed. Cut back on irritating foods; your stomach is more fragile than you think. Post-meal walks and yoga suit you well -- nothing too intense, just enough to keep your body and digestion moving.
mansions.seasonal_en: Fall is when your senses are sharpest -- autumn food, autumn scenery, autumn air all bring your earth energy to its peak. Spring brings new sensory experiences. Summer may affect your appetite; don't just eat whatever because it's too hot to care. Winter is perfect for warm foods and drinks, using taste to warm both body and spirit.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties, you already appreciate "the finer things" more than your peers. While everyone else is drinking instant coffee, you're already into pour-over. This pursuit of quality is a strength, but on a twenty-something budget, learning to distinguish "worth investing in" from "just wanting" matters. Put your money toward things that help you grow -- courses, good books, travel -- not just material indulgence.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your taste and pragmatism have found balance. You can now afford a certain quality of life, and every spending decision is considered. In the workplace, your "quality instinct" earns recognition -- your ability to judge good from bad is especially valuable in quality control, curation, and product selection.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, your life likely has considerable quality. You live comfortably, eat well, and everything around you has been carefully chosen. The challenge at this stage is not letting material things be your only source of security. Start building a sense of worth in non-material areas too -- the quality of your relationships, the richness of your experiences, your contributions to others.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 胃宿 people over fifty are connoisseurs. The taste and judgment you've cultivated over a lifetime let you distinguish quality in every aspect of life. Younger people come to you not just for opinions, but to learn your way of seeing things. This aesthetic sense and judgment can't be taught -- it can only be built over time, and you've had decades of it.

mansions.personality: 昴宿之人是社交場合的發光體。日性能量賦予你天生的溝通天賦和表達慾望，你不只是能說話，而是能把話說得讓人想聽。同樣一件事，別人說出來很無聊，你說出來就很有趣。你反應快、腦子轉得快，聊天的時候總能接到好的點、丟出讓人笑的梗。朋友聚會如果你不在，氣氛就會差一截。你也很懂得察言觀色，知道什麼時候該說什麼話、對誰該用什麼語氣。這個天賦的另一面是你太習慣「表演」了——有時候連你自己都分不清楚哪些是真心話、哪些是場面話。你需要至少一兩個能讓你卸下社交面具的人，在他們面前你不需要有趣、不需要接話、只需要做你自己。
mansions.love: 你在感情中最怕冷場。沉默對你來說不是安靜，而是一種令人焦慮的空白。你需要一個能跟你聊的對象——不一定要多會說話，但至少要願意回應你、跟你互動。你的感情地雷是對方不溝通——你問「你在想什麼」，對方回「沒有」，這三個字足以讓你抓狂。但你也要學會一件事：有時候對方只是需要安靜，不是在生你的氣。理想的對象是能欣賞你的幽默感、同時也能讓你安靜下來的人。練習在對方不說話的時候不要急著填補空白——沉默也是一種親密。
mansions.career: 適合需要溝通和表達能力的工作，如業務銷售、主持人、寫作、公關、教學、行銷、社群經營等。你的口才和反應力是職場上稀有的資產。你能把複雜的概念用簡單的方式解釋，能在提案的時候讓客戶點頭，能在會議上化解尷尬的沉默。升遷的關鍵在於深度——你表達能力很強，但有時候「說得好」會掩蓋「想得不夠深」。建議在每次發言之前多花一點時間想清楚，讓你的話不只有趣，還有份量。另外，學會傾聽比學會說話更能幫你升遷。
mansions.health: 呼吸系統是你最需要注意的部位——你話多、愛笑、表情豐富，這些都在消耗你的肺氣。換季的時候你特別容易感冒或喉嚨痛，如果你的工作需要大量說話，更要注意保護喉嚨。日性體質的你也需要注意肩膀和手臂的使用——長時間打字、滑手機、用電腦，這些重複動作對上肢的傷害比你想像的大。建議每天做肩頸和手臂的伸展，保持良好的作息來維護免疫力。適合你的運動是有社交性的項目——打球、跳舞、團體課程，比一個人跑步更能讓你持之以恆。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你是聚會裡最搶眼的人。你的幽默感、反應力、和社交天賦讓你在任何場合都不缺朋友。這是你最大的資產之一，但也要注意不要讓「有趣」成為你唯一的標籤。在表面的社交能力之下，花時間培養深度的專業知識——當你既有趣又有料的時候，你的影響力會倍增。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的溝通能力在職場上成為了核心競爭力。你能把複雜的事情說得讓人秒懂、能在會議上化解尷尬、能讓客戶笑著買單。這些都是很值錢的技能。這個階段的課題是在「廣泛社交」和「深度關係」之間取得平衡——你認識的人很多，但真正了解你的人有幾個？
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你開始從「說」轉向「聽」。不是你不愛說話了，而是你發現傾聽帶來的收穫比表達更多。你的社交網路已經夠廣了，現在需要的是深化其中最重要的幾段關係。這個階段你可能會意識到，年輕時有些「朋友」其實只是「觀眾」——留下真正在乎你的人。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的昴宿人是天生的演說家和導師。你一輩子累積的溝通技巧加上豐富的人生經歷，讓你說的每一句話都有份量。你在教學、輔導、公開演講的舞台上特別有魅力——你能把嚴肅的人生道理講得讓人會心一笑。你的聲音值得被更多人聽到。

mansions.seasonal: 夏天是你社交的旺季，日性能量在長日照中完全展開。夏天你的表現慾和社交需求最強，適合參加聚會和拓展人脈。春天帶來新的表達靈感。秋天適合沉澱——把夏天的經歷消化成有深度的觀點。冬天你可能會比較安靜，這段時間多充實自己的知識庫。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，心高志遠，好名聲。性清雅而有品格，日之精華照耀，容儀端正。好學藝，宜有二男。
mansions.personality_ja: 昴宿は白虎の尾に位し、日の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、気品高く、美意識に優れる。日輪の輝きを受け、華やかなる魅力と高い志を持つ。芸術的感性に恵まれ、美しきものを追求する上品なる性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）昴宿者，日性華美，感情中重浪漫與美感。天生魅力出眾，追求者眾。然虛榮心宜戒，真心方得真愛。
mansions.love_ja: 昴宿は日の気を帯び、恋愛においてロマンスと美を追い求める。天性の華やかさで異性を惹きつけるが、虚栄に溺れず真心を以て接することが真の愛を得る道。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從華美表現之業，演藝娛樂、廣告行銷、時尚產業。日性之華，使光彩照人。
mansions.career_ja: 華やかさと表現力を要する職業に適す。芸能・広告・マーケティング・ファッションなど。日の気がもたらす輝きにより、人々の注目を集める。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）日火旺盛易上火，宜清心降火。皮膚與眼部尤須保養。
mansions.health_ja: 日の火が旺盛にして上火しやすい体質。清心降火を心がけ、皮膚と目の保養に特に気を配るべし。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上優雅從容。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は天性の華やかさで周囲を魅了する時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして魅力に深みが加わり、本物の輝きを放つ。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は華麗さの中に実質を備え、表裏一体の存在感を示す。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は優雅にして従容、齢を重ねるほどに美しくなる。

day_fortune.summary: 昴宿日宜慶事、掘井、搬遷。裁縫不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 祝い事・井戸掘り・引越しに吉。裁縫・裁断に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜慶事、穿井、移居。裁衣凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 昴宿 days are favorable for celebrations, well-digging, and moving. Sewing and tailoring are not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 昴宿 light up any social setting. Solar energy gives you a natural gift for communication and a desire to express yourself. You don't just talk -- you make people want to listen. The same story sounds boring when someone else tells it but entertaining when you do. You're quick-witted, sharp, and always land the right joke or pick up the conversational thread at just the right moment. Any gathering without you feels a little flat. You're also perceptive, knowing what to say to whom and in what tone. The flip side of this gift is that you're so used to "performing" that sometimes even you can't tell which parts are genuine and which are for show. You need at least one or two people around whom you can drop the social mask -- people in front of whom you don't need to be entertaining or witty, just yourself.
mansions.love_en: Your biggest fear in a relationship is dead air. Silence doesn't feel peaceful to you -- it feels like an anxious void. You need a partner who can keep up the conversation; they don't need to be a great talker, but they have to be willing to engage. Your dealbreaker is a partner who won't communicate. You ask "what are you thinking" and they say "nothing" -- those three syllables are enough to drive you up the wall. But you also need to learn something: sometimes your partner just needs quiet and it's not about you. Your ideal match appreciates your humor and can also help you settle into stillness. Practice not rushing to fill the silence when your partner goes quiet -- silence can be intimate too.
mansions.career_en: You fit roles demanding communication and presentation skills: sales, hosting, writing, public relations, teaching, marketing, social media management. Your eloquence and quick thinking are rare workplace assets. You can explain complex concepts simply, get clients nodding along during pitches, and break awkward silences in meetings. The key to advancing is depth -- your expression is strong, but sometimes "sounding good" masks "not thinking deep enough." Before speaking up, spend a bit more time thinking it through so your words carry weight, not just charm. And learning to listen will do more for your career than learning to speak.
mansions.health_en: Your respiratory system needs the most attention. You talk a lot, laugh a lot, and your face is always animated -- all of which consume lung energy. Seasonal transitions often bring colds or sore throats, and if your work involves heavy speaking, throat care is essential. Solar-constitution types also need to watch their shoulders and arms -- long hours typing, scrolling, and using a computer cause more upper-limb strain than you'd expect. Do daily shoulder, neck, and arm stretches, and maintain good sleep habits to support your immune system. Social exercise suits you best -- team sports, dance classes, or group fitness keep you committed far better than solo running.
mansions.seasonal_en: Summer is your social peak season; solar energy unfolds fully in long daylight hours. Your desire to perform and socialize peaks in summer -- a great time for gatherings and expanding your network. Spring sparks new expressive inspiration. Fall is for settling down and turning summer's experiences into deeper perspectives. Winter brings a quieter phase; use it to restock your knowledge base.

life_stages_en.twenties: In your twenties, you're the star of every gathering. Your humor, quick reflexes, and social talent mean you never lack friends in any setting. This is one of your biggest assets, but make sure "entertaining" doesn't become your only label. Beneath the surface-level social skill, invest time building deep professional expertise -- when you're both fun and substantial, your influence multiplies.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your communication ability has become a core professional advantage. You can make complex things instantly understandable, defuse awkward moments in meetings, and get clients to sign with a smile. These are valuable skills. The challenge at this stage is balancing "wide socializing" with "deep relationships." You know a lot of people, but how many truly know you?
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, you start shifting from "talking" to "listening." Not because you've lost interest in speaking, but because you've discovered that listening yields more than expressing. Your social network is already wide enough; what you need now is to deepen the few relationships that matter most. You may realize that some "friends" from your youth were really just "audience" -- keep the ones who genuinely care.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 昴宿 people over fifty are born speakers and mentors. A lifetime of communication skills plus rich life experience give weight to every word you say. You're especially compelling on stages for teaching, coaching, and public speaking -- you can deliver serious life lessons and make the audience smile. Your voice deserves to be heard by more people.

mansions.personality: 畢宿之人是那個把「家」看得比什麼都重要的人。月性能量賦予你豐富的情感和照顧人的本能——你的冰箱永遠是滿的、家裡永遠有熱茶、朋友來你家一定會被餵飽。你天生就知道怎麼讓人覺得溫暖和安心，不是靠說好聽的話，而是靠那些默默的關心和行動。你記得每個朋友的生日、知道誰最近心情不好、會在對方需要的時候出現。這份溫暖是你最珍貴的特質，但也是你最大的弱點——你太容易被別人的情緒影響了。對方難過你跟著難過，對方焦慮你也跟著焦慮，長期下來你會搞不清楚哪些情緒是自己的、哪些是別人的。建議學會在「感受到」和「承接下來」之間拉一條線——你可以理解對方的感受，但不需要一起沉進去。
mansions.love: 你是那種從交往第一天就開始想「以後我們的家要什麼樣子」的人。你渴望穩定、忠誠、有歸屬感的關係，一夜情和曖昧遊戲不是你的風格。你在感情中會把對方照顧得無微不至——記得他喜歡的口味、幫他準備好出門要穿的衣服、生病的時候請假陪他看醫生。你的感情地雷是對方不重視家庭——你煮了一桌菜他說他已經在外面吃過了，這種事會讓你心碎。理想的對象是同樣重視家庭的人，跟你一起經營一個溫暖的小窩。但也要記住，照顧對方的同時不要失去自己——你自己的興趣、朋友、空間也很重要。
mansions.career: 適合需要照顧和服務特質的工作，如餐飲經營、幼兒教育、護理、社會工作、寵物照護、居家設計等。你做這些工作不是為了薪水，而是因為你真的在乎。客戶和同事能感受到你的真心，這讓你在服務業特別受歡迎。升遷的挑戰在於你太感性了——該開除的人你不忍心開除、該拒絕的客戶你不好意思拒絕、明明該漲價你怕客人跑掉。學會在「有溫度」和「有原則」之間找到平衡。你可以當一個溫暖的主管，但溫暖不等於沒有底線。
mansions.health: 你的情緒和身體是直接連動的——心情好的時候什麼都沒事，心情差的時候渾身不對勁。胸部（特別是胸悶的感覺）和胃部是你的弱點區域。你壓力大的時候可能會用吃來安撫自己，或者反過來完全沒食慾。月性體質的你情緒本來就有高低起伏，這是正常的，不要覺得自己「太情緒化」。建議維持規律的飲食和睡眠——這對別人可能只是建議，對你是必須。睡眠不足會讓你的情緒波動加倍。適合你的運動是游泳或在大自然中散步，水元素的環境對月性體質特別有療癒效果。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你可能已經是朋友圈裡的「媽媽」了。誰餓了你會問要不要煮東西、誰難過了你會陪他聊到半夜。這種照顧人的本能讓你很受歡迎，但注意不要在二十幾歲就把自己活成別人的保姆。你也有自己的人生要過、自己的夢想要追。先學會照顧好自己，才有能量照顧更多人。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你可能正面臨「為自己而活」還是「為別人而活」的拉扯。工作上你想追求更高的目標，但家裡有人需要你照顧；你想去冒險，但怕讓在乎的人擔心。這個階段的功課是學會兼顧而非二選一。你可以同時是好的照顧者和有追求的個體——關鍵是設定優先順序和學會求助。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你可能會經歷一次深刻的自我覺醒——意識到這輩子花太多時間照顧別人了。這不是後悔，而是一種理解：你值得被同等地對待。這個階段開始把更多時間和精力分配給自己的興趣、健康和內在成長，你會發現你照顧自己的能力，跟你照顧別人的能力一樣強。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的畢宿人是家庭和社群中溫暖的核心。你一輩子的付出和照顧，讓你周圍圍繞著真心愛你的人。這個年紀你終於能夠安心地接受被照顧了——讓孩子們為你做一頓飯、讓朋友來陪你聊天、讓自己好好享受。你值得。

mansions.seasonal: 秋天是你情感最豐富的季節，落葉的氛圍跟你的月性特質共鳴。秋天適合跟重要的人做深度的交流。冬天你對家的渴望會特別強烈，這段時間適合待在家裡、布置空間、跟家人相處。春天帶來新的照顧對象和關係。夏天的社交活動多但注意不要過度消耗自己。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，溫柔敦厚，善交友。性和善而有人緣，月之精華潤澤，善撫育後人。多饒財寶，宜有三男。
mansions.personality_ja: 畢宿は白虎の尾端に位し、月の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、温和敦厚にして人望厚し。月の潤いを受け、穏やかなる人柄にて周囲に安らぎを与える。人との縁に恵まれ、財福も自然と集まる吉慶の性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）畢宿者，月性溫柔，感情細膩而體貼。善營造溫馨氣氛，是天生之家庭守護者。然過度犧牲則失衡。
mansions.love_ja: 畢宿は月の気を帯び、感情は繊細にして思いやり深い。温かな雰囲気を作り出す天性の家庭人なるも、過度の自己犠牲は心身の均衡を崩す。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從養育照護之業，教育保育、醫療看護、餐飲料理。月性之溫，使人如沐春風。
mansions.career_ja: 育成と世話を要する職業に適す。教育・保育・医療看護・料理など。月の気がもたらす温もりにより、接する人すべてを安らがせる。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）月性寒涼，體質偏寒者宜溫補。婦人科系宜定期檢查。
mansions.health_ja: 月の気は寒涼に属し、冷え性になりやすい体質。温補を心がけ、婦人科系の定期検診も怠らぬよう。

life_stages_classic.forties: （編者歸納）四十歲眾人之母（父）。
life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上福澤綿長。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は温かい心で周囲に接し、信頼の種を蒔く時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして家庭に円満をもたらし、仕事にも温もりを注ぐ。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は皆の母（父）のような存在として慕われる。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は長年の温かさが福徳となって子孫に及ぶ。

day_fortune.summary: 畢宿日宜祭祀、結婚、建築、農事。散財不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 祭祀・婚礼・建築・農事に吉。金銭の流出に注意。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜祭祀、婚姻、造作、農事。散財凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 畢宿 days are favorable for rituals, marriage, construction, and farming. Wasteful spending is not recommended. (Based on the Twenty-Eight Mansions traditional day-fortune system.)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 畢宿 put "home" above everything else. Lunar energy gives you deep emotions and a natural instinct to care for others -- your fridge is always full, there's always hot tea ready, and any friend who visits your place leaves well-fed. You instinctively know how to make people feel warm and safe, not through sweet words but through quiet acts of care. You remember every friend's birthday, notice when someone's feeling down, and show up when they need you. This warmth is your most precious trait, but also your greatest vulnerability -- you absorb other people's emotions too easily. When they're sad, you're sad; when they're anxious, you're anxious. Over time, you lose track of which feelings are yours and which are theirs. Learn to draw a line between "sensing" and "absorbing" -- you can understand someone's feelings without sinking into them yourself.
mansions.love_en: You're the type who starts imagining "what our home will look like" from day one of a relationship. You want stability, loyalty, and belonging -- casual flings and ambiguous games aren't your style. In a relationship, you take care of your partner down to every detail: remembering their favorite flavors, laying out their clothes before they leave, taking time off work to go to the doctor with them when they're sick. Your dealbreaker is a partner who doesn't value home life. You cook an entire spread and they say they already ate out -- that kind of thing breaks your heart. Your ideal match values family just as much and wants to build a warm little nest together. But remember: while caring for your partner, don't lose yourself. Your own interests, friends, and personal space matter too.
mansions.career_en: You're suited for work that involves caring for and serving others: food and beverage, early childhood education, nursing, social work, pet care, home design. You do these jobs not for the paycheck but because you genuinely care. Clients and colleagues sense your sincerity, which makes you especially popular in service industries. The challenge for promotion is being too sentimental -- you can't bring yourself to fire the person who needs to go, you won't turn down a client you should, and you're afraid raising prices will drive customers away. Learn to balance "warmth" and "boundaries." You can be a caring leader, but caring doesn't mean having no limits.
mansions.health_en: Your emotions and body are directly linked -- when you're happy, everything's fine; when you're down, nothing feels right. Your chest (especially tightness) and stomach are weak spots. Under stress, you might eat for comfort or lose your appetite completely. Lunar-constitution types naturally have emotional highs and lows; this is normal, so don't label yourself "too emotional." Maintaining regular meals and sleep isn't just advice for you -- it's a requirement. Sleep deprivation doubles your emotional swings. Swimming or walking in nature suits you best; water environments are especially healing for lunar constitutions.
mansions.seasonal_en: Fall is your most emotionally rich season; the atmosphere of falling leaves resonates with your lunar nature. It's a good time for deep conversations with important people. In winter, your longing for home intensifies -- stay in, arrange your space, spend time with family. Spring brings new people to care about and new connections. Summer's social calendar is full, but watch out for overextending yourself.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties, you're probably already the "mom" of your friend group. Someone's hungry and you're offering to cook; someone's upset and you're staying up all night to talk them through it. This caretaking instinct makes you well-loved, but be careful not to turn yourself into everyone's caretaker at twenty-something. You have your own life to live and your own dreams to chase. Learn to take care of yourself first -- only then will you have the energy to care for more people.
life_stages_en.thirties: In your thirties, you're likely caught between "living for myself" and "living for others." At work you want to aim higher, but someone at home needs you; you want to take risks, but you're afraid of worrying those you love. The lesson at this stage is learning to do both rather than choosing one. You can be a devoted caretaker and an ambitious individual at the same time -- the key is setting priorities and learning to ask for help.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty, you may go through a deep self-awakening -- realizing you've spent too much of your life taking care of others. This isn't regret but understanding: you deserve equal treatment. Start directing more time and energy toward your own interests, health, and inner growth. You'll find that your ability to take care of yourself is every bit as strong as your ability to take care of others.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 畢宿 people over fifty are the warm center of their families and communities. A lifetime of giving and caring has surrounded you with people who genuinely love you. At this age, you can finally accept being cared for in return. Let your children cook you a meal, let friends come visit, let yourself enjoy. You deserve it.

mansions.personality: 觜宿之人自帶聚光燈——你走進一個房間，人們的目光會不自覺地被你吸引。火性能量賦予你天生的自信和表現力，你在台上比台下更自在，在人群中比獨處更有能量。你有一種讓人想追隨的魅力，不是靠裝腔作勢，而是靠真正的熱情和感染力。當你認真說一件事的時候，別人會不自覺地被你帶動。你喜歡被注意、被認可，這不是虛榮，而是你的能量需要觀眾才能完全釋放。問題在於你對批評的承受力比外表看起來低——你看起來很自信，但一句否定的話可能讓你心裡翻攪好幾天。建議區分「建設性的批評」和「人身攻擊」，前者是幫你變更好，後者才需要無視。
mansions.love: 你在感情中需要被欣賞——不是要對方跪拜你，但至少要讓你感覺到他以你為榮。你會為了對方的一句讚美開心一整天，也會因為對方對你的成就無感而失落很久。你的感情地雷是被冷落或被拿來跟別人比較——「你看人家老公多會賺錢」這種話可以直接摧毀你們的關係。你在感情中慷慨大方，願意為對方付出很多，但也期待對方看見你的付出。理想的對象是能欣賞你的光芒、同時也有自己發光點的人。要注意的是，感情不是舞台表演，不需要時時刻刻都精彩。學會在平凡的日常中找到兩個人的溫度。
mansions.career: 適合需要個人魅力和領導力的工作，如管理職、表演藝術、設計、品牌經營、講師、公眾人物、活動策劃等。你天生就有站在台前的能力，而且你享受那個位置。你能激勵團隊、能讓客戶買單、能讓一場活動活起來。升遷的陷阱在於你太在意自己的光環了——如果每件事都要你當主角，團隊裡的其他人會覺得自己是配角而心生不滿。學會當導演而不只是當主角，讓團隊成員也有表現的舞台。你的另一個課題是接受失敗——不是每次上台都會獲得掌聲，偶爾的失敗不代表你不行。
mansions.health: 心臟和脊椎是你最需要注意的部位。火性能量讓你看起來永遠精力充沛、充滿熱情，但你的心臟其實一直在高速運轉。你壓力大的時候不會表現出來——因為你不能讓人看到你脆弱的一面——但胸口的壓迫感和背部的緊繃會出賣你。長期維持「完美形象」的心理壓力也會反映在脊椎上，特別是上背部和頸部。建議找到一個安全的空間，讓你可以卸下盔甲做回普通人。適合你的運動是有表演性的項目——舞蹈、武術、體操，既能鍛鍊身體又能滿足你的表現慾。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你可能已經是團體裡的領頭人了——不是因為你強迫別人跟著你，而是你天生就有一種讓人想追隨的魅力。好好利用這份天賦，但記住：領導不是站在台上接受掌聲，而是在台下替大家解決問題。你現在培養的領導力會成為你一輩子最重要的資產。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的領導能力和個人魅力在職場上得到了充分的認可。你可能已經在帶團隊了，或者在某個領域成為了有影響力的人。這個階段的課題是學會分享舞台——你不需要永遠當主角，讓團隊成員也有發光的機會。好的領導者不是自己最亮，而是讓身邊的人都亮起來。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你的影響力從「個人魅力」轉向了「制度和文化」。你不再靠每天站在台前來帶動團隊了，而是靠你建立的制度和培養的人才。這個轉變不容易，因為你喜歡站在台前的感覺。但真正的影響力是你不在場的時候事情依然能運轉——這才是你最大的成就。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的觜宿人是有氣場的智者。你不需要刻意展現什麼，你往那裡一站，大家就會安靜下來聽你說話。你的影響力已經不需要透過行動來證明了——你的存在、你的眼光、你的一句話，就足以改變一個局面。用這份力量去做真正重要的事。

mansions.seasonal: 夏天是你能量的高峰，火性在酷暑中完全點燃。夏天適合你做那些需要衝勁和魄力的事情。春天的能量上升讓你蠢蠢欲動。秋天你的表現慾開始收斂，適合沉下心來做實質的工作。冬天需要特別注意不要過度消耗——你的火焰需要燃料，冬天是補充燃料的時候。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，明辨是非，善言論。性聰敏而有見識，火性照破，善分析事理。好追究真相，宜有二男。
mansions.personality_ja: 觜宿は南方朱雀の首に位し、火の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、明晰なる頭脳を持ち、物事の是非を鋭く見抜く。分析力に優れ、論理的思考を以て真実を追究する。言葉鋭く、弁論の才に長ける性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）觜宿者，火性銳利，感情中重率直與真實。口才犀利，表達直接。然言語之火宜慎用，傷人之言難以收回。
mansions.love_ja: 觜宿は火の気を帯び、恋愛においても率直さと真実を重んじる。弁舌鋭く表現は直截的なるも、言葉の火は慎重に用いるべし。放たれた言葉は取り消せぬ。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從言辭表達之業，律師辯護、評論批評、教學講演。火性之銳，使辯才無礙。
mansions.career_ja: 言語表現を要する職業に適す。弁護士・評論家・教師・講演者など。火の気がもたらす鋭い弁舌により、論理的で説得力ある話術を持つ。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）火旺傷陰液，口腔與咽喉宜留意。宜多飲水、少食辛辣。
mansions.health_ja: 火が旺じると陰液を傷め、口腔と咽喉に支障を来しやすい。水分摂取を心がけ、辛辣な食物を控えるべし。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上言簡意賅。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は弁舌の才を磨き、表現力を高める時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして言葉に重みが加わり、発言に説得力が増す。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は一言が千金の重みを持ち、影響力ある言論者に。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は少ない言葉で核心を突く、簡潔にして深い表現の達人となる。

day_fortune.summary: 觜宿日惟入學吉。新築則家財散失，開業亦不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 入学のみ吉。新築は家財を失い、開業も凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）惟入學吉。新造則喪家財，開業亦凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 觜宿 days are auspicious only for starting education. New construction leads to loss of family wealth, and opening a business is also unfavorable. (Rekichu Gedan / Hoki Naiden lineage, 28 Mansions Activity Guide)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 觜宿 carry their own spotlight. When you walk into a room, eyes gravitate toward you without anyone quite knowing why. Fire energy gives you natural confidence and expressiveness. You feel more alive on stage than off it, more energized in a crowd than alone. You have the kind of charisma that makes people want to follow you, not because you put on airs, but because your genuine passion is contagious. When you speak with conviction, others get swept up in your momentum. You enjoy being noticed and recognized. This is not vanity; your energy simply needs an audience to fully ignite. The catch is that your tolerance for criticism is lower than your confident exterior suggests. One dismissive remark can replay in your head for days. Learn to separate constructive feedback from personal attacks. The former helps you improve; the latter deserves to be ignored.
mansions.love_en: In relationships, you need to feel admired. You are not asking your partner to worship you, but you do need to sense that they are proud of you. A single compliment from your partner can carry you through the day, while their indifference toward your achievements can sting for weeks. Your emotional landmine is being overlooked or compared to others. A remark like "look how much more so-and-so's partner earns" can wreck the relationship on the spot. You are generous in love and willing to give a lot, but you also expect your efforts to be seen. Your ideal partner appreciates your light while having their own glow. Keep in mind that love is not a stage performance. It does not need to be dazzling every moment. Learn to find warmth with your partner in ordinary, everyday life.
mansions.career_en: You thrive in roles that demand personal magnetism and leadership: management, performing arts, design, brand building, public speaking, event planning, or any public-facing position. You were born to stand at the front, and you enjoy it. You can rally a team, win over clients, and bring an event to life. The promotion trap is caring too much about your own spotlight. If every project has to star you, your teammates will feel sidelined and resentful. Learn to be the director, not just the lead actor. Give your team members their own stage. Your other lesson is accepting failure. Not every appearance earns applause, and an occasional stumble does not mean you are not good enough.
mansions.health_en: Your heart and spine need the most attention. Fire energy makes you look endlessly energetic and passionate, but your heart is actually running at high speed all the time. Under stress you refuse to show weakness, yet tightness in your chest and tension across your back betray you. The psychological burden of maintaining a perfect image tends to settle in your upper back and neck. Find a safe space where you can take off the armor and just be an ordinary person. Performative sports suit you best: dance, martial arts, gymnastics. They train your body while satisfying your need to express yourself.
mansions.seasonal_en: Summer is your peak season. Fire energy fully ignites in the heat, making it the best time to tackle anything requiring drive and boldness. Spring's rising energy makes you restless and eager. In autumn your desire for the spotlight starts to fade, and it is a good time to buckle down on substantive work. Winter calls for extra care not to burn through your reserves. Your flame needs fuel, and winter is when you stock up.

life_stages_en.twenties: By your twenties you are probably already the leader of your social circle, not because you forced anyone to follow, but because people are naturally drawn to you. Make the most of that gift, but remember: leadership is not about standing on stage soaking up applause. It is about solving problems for others behind the scenes. The leadership skills you build now will be your most important asset for life.
life_stages_en.thirties: In your thirties, your leadership ability and personal charisma earn full recognition at work. You may already be running a team or have become an influential figure in your field. The lesson at this stage is sharing the stage. You do not need to be the star every time. Let your team members shine too. A great leader is not the brightest person in the room but the one who helps everyone else light up.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty your influence shifts from personal charisma to systems and culture. You no longer rally the team by showing up on stage every day. Instead, you lead through the structures you have built and the people you have developed. This transition is hard because you love being in the spotlight. But true influence is when things keep running even when you are not there. That is your greatest achievement.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 觜宿 people over fifty carry the presence of a seasoned sage. You do not need to perform anything. You simply stand there, and the room goes quiet to listen. Your influence no longer needs action to prove itself. Your presence, your perspective, a single sentence from you can shift the entire situation. Use that power for things that truly matter.

mansions.personality: 參宿之人是完美主義的化身——不是那種嘴上說說的完美主義，而是真的會因為 PPT 上少一個像素而改到半夜的那種。水性能量賦予你超強的分析和歸納能力，你看事情永遠是先看到不對的地方。別人交報告你能一眼看出數字哪裡不合邏輯，別人穿搭你能馬上發現哪個配色不協調。你做出來的東西品質很高，因為你不允許自己交出有瑕疵的作品。問題在於你把這個標準也套用在所有人身上了——包括你自己。你會因為一封寫不好的 email 而重寫五次，會因為一次不完美的表現而自我檢討好幾天。建議給自己設定一個「可以接受的標準」，到了就停手。完美是達不到的，但你已經比大多數人都好了。
mansions.love: 你在感情中最大的挑戰是「挑剔」。你能看到對方身上一百個優點，但那一個缺點會像一根刺一樣卡在你腦子裡，讓你越想越不舒服。你對理想伴侶有一個很具體的畫面，現實中的人永遠跟那個畫面有差距。這讓你可能錯過很多不完美但很真誠的對象。你的感情地雷是對方做事粗糙或不靠譜——約會遲到、答應的事沒做到、房間亂七八糟，這些在你眼中不是小事而是態度問題。理想的對象是在你在乎的事情上有基本水準，但偶爾能用他的隨性幫你放鬆的人。練習看到對方「做到了什麼」而不是「沒做到什麼」，你的感情觀會寬廣很多。
mansions.career: 適合需要精確度和分析能力的工作，如會計師、編輯校對、品質管理、數據分析、程式開發、審計、研究等。你是團隊裡的品質把關者——經過你的手，錯誤出不去。你在需要細心和耐心的工作上能展現獨特的價值，那些別人嫌無聊的細節工作，你做起來卻很有成就感。升遷的障礙在於速度——你追求品質的同時常常犧牲了效率，主管可能覺得你做事太慢。建議學會區分「需要完美的工作」和「只需要夠好的工作」。不是每封 email 都需要寫三遍，把你的完美主義留給真正重要的任務。
mansions.health: 消化系統和神經系統是你最敏感的部位。你的焦慮會直接反映在腸胃上——壓力大就便秘或拉肚子，考試前或報告前可能會胃痛。你也是那種會因為一件小事想到失眠的人，腦子裡的分析程式關不掉，越想越清醒。建議睡前做「大腦傾倒」練習：把腦子裡所有的想法寫在紙上，寫完就合起來，告訴自己明天再處理。適合你的運動是需要全神貫注的項目，像是攀岩或桌球，能強迫你的大腦從焦慮模式切換到專注模式。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你可能因為太追求完美而經常覺得自己不夠好。別人覺得你的作品已經很棒了，你看到的只有那個小瑕疵。這種高標準在培養專業能力時是優勢，但也會讓你遲遲不敢行動。給自己一個期限：到了這個日期就交出去，不管你覺得完不完美。比起完美的空想，不完美的行動更有價值。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的精確度和分析能力成為了職場上最被重視的特質。經過你的手的東西品質有保證——這讓你成為團隊裡不可或缺的品質守門員。這個階段需要學會的是區分「需要完美」和「夠好就好」的場合。不是每件事都值得你花三倍的時間去做到 100 分——把完美主義留給真正重要的 20% 工作。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你開始跟自己的完美主義和解了。不是你不在乎品質了，而是你學會了在品質和效率之間找到最佳平衡點。你的判斷力讓你知道什麼時候要堅持、什麼時候要放手，這種智慧是年輕時的你沒有的。這個階段你最大的價值是當別人的品質顧問——告訴他們什麼地方要注意、什麼地方可以放過。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的參宿人是細節的守護者。在這個「差不多就好」的世界裡，你堅持的精確和品質反而成為了稀有的價值。你一輩子累積的經驗讓你一眼就能看出問題在哪裡。繼續堅持你的標準，但也要學會欣賞不完美中的美——人生本來就不需要每一格都對齊。

mansions.seasonal: 冬天是你最能專注的季節，安靜的環境讓你的分析力和專注力達到最高。秋天適合做品質檢視和總結。春天的新事物可能讓你有點焦慮——太多不確定性讓你不舒服。夏天注意不要因為躁熱而降低你對品質的標準。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，勇武果決，不畏強權。性豪爽而有膽識，水性深沉，善處亂世。好冒險，宜有二男。
mansions.personality_ja: 参宿は朱雀の翼に位し、水の気を帯びる。此の宿に生まれし者は、豪胆にして果断、権力を恐れぬ気概あり。深き思慮と大胆なる行動力を兼ね備え、乱世に力を発揮する。独立心強く、自らの道を切り拓く性質なり。
mansions.love_classic: （編者歸納）参宿者，水性機敏，感情中重智慧與趣味。談笑風生，以幽默與機智吸引對方。然深情不易外露。
mansions.love_ja: 参宿は水の気を帯び、恋愛において知性とユーモアを大切にする。軽妙な話術で相手を楽しませるが、深い感情は容易に表に出さぬ奥ゆかしさを持つ。
mansions.career_classic: （編者歸納）宜從技藝精巧之業，工藝製作、技術開發、醫藥調劑。水性之巧，使手藝精湛。
mansions.career_ja: 技術と精巧さを要する職業に適す。工芸・技術開発・医薬調剤など。水の気がもたらす器用さにより、緻密な技を極める。
mansions.health_classic: （編者歸納）水性多慮，神經系宜留意。過思傷脾，宜動靜結合以養生。
mansions.health_ja: 水の気は思慮を深めるが、神経系に負担がかかりやすい。過度の思慮は脾を傷めるため、動と静を組み合わせた養生が肝要。

life_stages_classic.fifties_plus: （編者歸納）五十歲以上出神入化。

life_stages_ja.twenties: 二十代は多彩な才能を開花させる時期。
life_stages_ja.thirties: 三十代にして技芸が精錬され、専門家としての地位を確立する。
life_stages_ja.forties: 四十代は独自の匠の心を持ち、誰にも真似できぬ境地に達する。
life_stages_ja.fifties_plus: 五十代以降は技と心が一体となり、出神入化の域に至る。

day_fortune.summary: 参宿日宜建築、養子、旅行、交涉。裁縫不宜。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系，二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_ja: 家屋建築・養子縁組・旅行・交渉に吉。裁縫・裁断に凶。（暦注下段・簠簋内伝系、二十八宿行事吉凶）
day_fortune.summary_classic: （暦注下段・簠簋内伝系）宜造作、養子、行旅、交涉。裁衣凶。
day_fortune.summary_en: 参宿 days are auspicious for construction, adoption, travel, and negotiation. Tailoring is unfavorable. (Rekichu Gedan / Hoki Naiden lineage, 28 Mansions Activity Guide)

mansions.personality_en: People born under 参宿 are perfectionism incarnate, and not the casual, self-proclaimed kind. You are the person who stays up until midnight because a single pixel in the presentation is off. Water energy gives you exceptional analytical and organizational skills. You always spot what is wrong first. You catch the number that does not add up in a report. You notice the color combination that clashes in an outfit. The quality of your work is consistently high because you refuse to submit anything with a flaw. The problem is that you apply this same standard to everyone, including yourself. You rewrite an email five times. You replay one imperfect performance in your head for days. Set a threshold for "good enough" and stop there. Perfection is unreachable, but you are already better than most.
mansions.love_en: Your biggest challenge in love is being picky. You can see a hundred good qualities in your partner, but that one flaw sticks in your brain like a splinter, growing more irritating the more you think about it. You carry a vivid mental image of the ideal partner, and real people always fall short. This can cause you to pass on someone who is imperfect but genuinely caring. Your emotional landmine is a partner who is sloppy or unreliable: showing up late for a date, breaking promises, leaving the room in chaos. To you, these are not minor issues but attitude problems. Your ideal match has a baseline standard on the things you care about, while being easygoing enough to help you relax once in a while. Practice noticing what your partner does right instead of fixating on what they do not. Your outlook on love will broaden considerably.
mansions.career_en: You excel in work that demands precision and analytical skill: accounting, editing and proofreading, quality assurance, data analysis, software development, auditing, research. You are the team's quality gatekeeper. Nothing gets past you with an error. You find genuine satisfaction in the meticulous, detail-oriented tasks that others find tedious. The obstacle to promotion is speed. Chasing quality often means sacrificing efficiency, and your manager may see you as slow. Learn to distinguish between tasks that need to be perfect and tasks that just need to be good enough. Not every email needs three drafts. Save your perfectionism for the work that truly matters.
mansions.health_en: Your digestive and nervous systems are your most sensitive areas. Anxiety hits your gut directly: stress brings constipation or diarrhea, and you may get stomach pain before exams or presentations. You are also the type who lies awake because your internal analysis engine will not shut off. The more you think, the more awake you get. Before bed, try a "brain dump" exercise: write everything in your head down on paper, close the notebook, and tell yourself it can wait until tomorrow. Sports that demand total concentration work best for you, like rock climbing or table tennis. They force your brain out of anxiety mode and into focus mode.
mansions.seasonal_en: Winter is your strongest season for focus. The quiet environment brings your analytical and concentration abilities to their peak. Autumn is good for quality reviews and wrap-ups. Spring's wave of new things may trigger anxiety, since too much uncertainty makes you uneasy. In summer, be careful not to let the heat erode your quality standards.

life_stages_en.twenties: In your twenties you probably feel like you are never good enough. Others think your work is impressive; all you see is the tiny flaw. This high bar is an asset when building professional skills, but it can also paralyze you into inaction. Give yourself a deadline: when that date arrives, submit it regardless of how imperfect it feels. An imperfect action beats a perfect plan that stays in your head.
life_stages_en.thirties: By thirty, your precision and analytical ability are among your most valued traits at work. Anything that passes through your hands has a quality guarantee, making you the indispensable quality guardian of the team. The lesson now is learning to tell apart situations that demand perfection from those where good enough will do. Not everything deserves three times the effort for a perfect score. Reserve your perfectionism for the 20% of work that truly matters.
life_stages_en.forties: After forty you start making peace with your perfectionism. It is not that you stop caring about quality; you have learned to find the optimal balance between quality and efficiency. Your judgment tells you when to insist and when to let go. That wisdom did not exist in your younger self. At this stage your greatest value is being a quality advisor for others, telling them where to pay attention and where they can ease up.
life_stages_en.fifties_plus: 参宿 people over fifty are guardians of detail. In a world of "close enough," the precision and quality you insist on have become rare and valuable. A lifetime of experience lets you spot the problem at a glance. Keep holding to your standards, but also learn to appreciate the beauty in imperfection. Life does not need every pixel perfectly aligned.

mansions.personality: 井宿之人是永遠的學生——你對世界的好奇心從來不會消退。木性能量帶來旺盛的求知慾，你可能同時在學三種語言、看五本書、追蹤十個不同領域的 YouTube 頻道。你跟人聊天總能聊到意想不到的話題，因為你什麼都知道一點。從量子力學到烘焙技巧，從歷史冷知識到最新的 AI 趨勢，你的知識庫雜得像一座百科全書。這種博學讓你在社交場合很有趣，但問題是你很難在一個領域待得夠久。你學到「不再有趣」的程度就會跳到下一個主題，結果很多事情都只會皮毛。建議選一到兩個你最有熱情的領域，逼自己在無聊的階段也堅持下去——真正的專業是在「不有趣」的階段練出來的。
mansions.love: 你在感情中需要的是「能一起成長」的感覺。對方不需要跟你一樣什麼都懂，但至少要對學習新事物抱持開放的態度。你最怕的感情模式是每天重複一樣的對話：「今天工作怎樣」「還好」「吃什麼」「隨便」——這種對話讓你想把頭撞牆。你的感情地雷是對方對任何事都不感興趣、不想了解、不願嘗試。理想的對象是有自己的知識領域，能教你一些你不知道的事情的人。你們的約會可以是一起去看展覽、一起上烹飪課、一起研究一個新主題。建議在追求智性刺激的同時，也要經營情感的深度——感情不是只有有趣，還要有溫度。
mansions.career: 適合需要持續學習和跨領域整合的工作，如媒體記者、教育、科技業、研究、顧問、數據科學、知識管理等。你最大的職場優勢是學得快——新系統、新工具、新流程，別人還在摸索的時候你已經上手了。你也很擅長把不同領域的知識串在一起，想出別人想不到的解法。升遷的障礙在於你太容易分心了——手上的專案還沒做完，你已經在想下一個更有趣的東西。建議每次只接手一到兩個專案，做完再換。你的另一個課題是「教別人」——你腦子裡有很多好東西，但你講太快、跳太多，別人跟不上。放慢速度，你會成為很棒的導師。
mansions.health: 手部和神經系統是你最需要注意的部位。你的雙手幾乎沒停過——打字、滑手機、翻書、做手工——腕隧道症候群和手指關節痛可能已經在找你了。建議每工作 45 分鐘就做一組手部和手腕的伸展操。你的腦子也跟手一樣停不下來，這讓你的神經系統長期處於高度活躍的狀態，容易焦慮和失眠。你可能是那種躺在床上腦子裡還在跑各種有趣想法的人。建議睡前一小時不要再學新東西了，讓大腦進入關機模式。適合你的運動是需要手部協調的項目，像是乒乓球、攀岩或彈樂器。

life_stages.twenties: 二十歲的你大概同時在學五件不同的事。你的好奇心像一台永不停歇的雷達，掃到什麼有趣的就去研究一下。這種廣泛的學習在二十幾歲是絕對的優勢，因為你在建立一個別人沒有的知識網路。但建議在三十歲前找到你的「主修」——你可以有很多「選修」，但至少要有一個你深入到能稱為專家的領域。
life_stages.thirties: 三十歲你的跨領域知識開始發揮綜效了。別人只能從一個角度看問題，你能從五個角度看——這讓你在需要創新思維的場合特別有價值。你可能已經找到了一兩個核心的專業方向，同時保持對其他領域的好奇。這是你最好的狀態：有深度的通才。這個階段的挑戰是學會「教別人」你知道的東西。
life_stages.forties: 四十歲之後你的知識網路已經非常密集了。你能在看似無關的事情之間找到連結，這種跨域整合的能力是你最珍貴的資產。在組織中你可能扮演著「知識樞紐」的角色——大家有問題都會先問你。這個階段開始把你的知識系統化地整理和傳承，不要只放在你腦袋裡。
life_stages.fifties_plus: 五十歲以上的井宿人是真正的博學者。你一輩子的學習讓你在任何話題都能接上話、提出觀點。但你的價值不只是知識量大，而是你能幫助別人在資訊海洋中找到方向。在這個知識碎片化的時代，你提供的是脈絡和連結——這是 Google 做不到的。

mansions.seasonal: 春天是你學習慾望最強的季節，木性的生長能量讓你對新知識充滿渴望。夏天適合把學到的東西付諸實踐。秋天是整理和消化知識的好時機，把零散的學習整合成系統。冬天適合深度閱讀和反思，這段安靜的時期讓你的知識沉澱得更深。
mansions.personality_classic: （編者歸納）此宿生者，聰慧有智，善計算。性明敏而有才學，木性條達，善治理萬事。好研究，宜有三男。
